grade_basis: operative-plan specificity for right parasagittal 4cm meningioma abutting SSS
overall_usefulness: operative plan is clinically usable and materially more specific about parasagittal/SSS craniotomy and dural-opening strategy
operative_plan_usefulness: ties craniotomy, burr holes, dural opening, sinus-side sequence, and resection endpoint to MRV/CTV findings and venous anatomy
